description: Annotate detected features with putative metabolite identities by matching accurate masses against the HMDB databases using AccurateMassSearchEngine. Writes an annotated mzTab and a flat CSV of annotation hits.
rules: writes annotations.mzTab and annotations.csv under record_store
the pip wheel ships HMDBMappingFile.tsv but NOT HMDB2StructMapping.tsv; supply DB_STRUCT (and DB_MAPPING) to use a custom structure DB
usage: Set INPUT (featureXML/consensusXML). Optional NEGATIVE=1, PPM, DB_MAPPING, DB_STRUCT. Output: annotations.mzTab (+ annotations.csv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) AND the HMDB structure DB; without the structure DB the core exits early and the porter records the reason while still creating annotations.mzTab.
